meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Solve Debugging Issues with AI Workflows
content.seo_description: Master your debugging workflow. Learn how to overcome coding roadblocks using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-quality client projects faster.
content.answer_block: Stop fighting syntax errors manually. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for iterative terminal-based debugging, you transform debugging from a bottleneck into a systematic process. This workflow ensures you identify root causes instantly, maintain clean codebases, and keep your client delivery timelines on track.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is expecting a demo, and your terminal is bleeding red error logs. You’ve been staring at the same function for an hour, and the logic that seemed sound yesterday is now a black box of frustration. This is the 'debugging wall'—the silent killer of freelance profitability.

But elite builders don't solve bugs by guessing. They solve them by building systems that make bugs impossible to hide. By leveraging modern AI-assisted CLI tools, you can move from 'stuck' to 'shipped' in minutes, turning your development environment into an automated diagnostic lab.

steps.title: Standardize the Environment State
steps.description: Before debugging, ensure your environment is clean and reproducible. Use Claude Code to audit your current directory for dependency conflicts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and identify any potential dependency mismatches or configuration issues common in this stack.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit project dependencies for common version conflicts'

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Don't debug the whole app. Use AI to generate a minimal reproduction script to confirm exactly where the logic breaks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal, standalone reproduction script for the error identified in the logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a test case isolating the reported bug'

steps.title: Automated Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed the stack trace and the reproduction script into the AI to pinpoint the exact line of code causing the regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Examine this stack trace and reproduction script; identify the specific architectural flaw causing this behavior.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze logs and pinpoint the root cause of the crash'

steps.title: Apply Surgical Fixes
steps.description: Apply the fix using an automated patch, ensuring the surrounding logic remains untouched and the client contract is fulfilled.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular patch for the bug identified. Ensure it follows existing project coding standards.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply fix and verify with the reproduction script'

steps.title: Regression Testing
steps.description: Run a full suite of tests to ensure the fix hasn't introduced new issues, maintaining your professional reputation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests that cover the fixed functionality to prevent future regressions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'execute all tests and confirm zero regressions'

pro_tips: Always commit your 'broken' state to a separate branch before debugging; it’s your safety net if the AI suggests a refactor that goes off-rails.
Use CLI-based AI tools to generate documentation comments for the code you just fixed; clients love 'self-documenting' code.
If the AI struggles, ask it to explain the logic in plain English first; often, the act of explaining reveals the flaw in your own mental model.
Maintain a 'bug library' folder where you store successful AI-generated fixes; it makes future client work significantly faster.
Configure your IDE to automatically run the Claude Code 'lint' command every time you save to catch bugs before they ever reach the staging environment.
content.next_steps: After fixing the immediate bug, integrate a continuous integration (CI) pipeline to run your Claude Code tests automatically on every push, ensuring you never ship a regression to a client again.
content.conversion_block: You now have a professional-grade debugging workflow that separates the amateurs from the experts. Stop wasting billable hours on manual troubleshooting and start shipping faster. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
